{{Expand}}

{{Infobox goldsign
| name = Riyusai Meira's Goldsign
| introduced = Underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Riyusai Meira's Goldsign]] consists of vivid green vines and pink flowers growing out of her head.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c6">''Underlord'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Goldsigns]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
